Agent MGMT

The independent guide to agent orchestrators

A growing list of agentic IDEs and AI coding assistants — from terminal-native agents to full editors. The landscape changes weekly; this page is a snapshot to help you find the right tool for your workflow.

Add tool
Name Website Details Price GitHub stars Open source
Loading…

Who built this?

Hey, I'm Manuel, a developer and solopreneur based in Berlin, Germany. Like everybody else, I'm trying to navigate this new AI world we find outselves in.

I built this site for two reasons:

  • I think agent management tools will be an important category with a lot of innovation over the next few years.
  • I keep finding new tools and then quickly forgetting their names, so I needed a place to keep track of them.

I'm not looking to monetize this page, it's meant to be a community resource that helps other builders like me.
